Two targets made from natural uranium metal foils, the
diameter of the irradiated target samples was 15-mm,

The improved cascade-exciton model code CEM2K coupled

The Los Alamos version of the quark-gluon string model
LAQGSM coupled with GEM2 and CEM2K and LAQGSM both
coupled with the sequential-binary-decay model GEMINI.
The gamma spectra of activated uranium targets
were measured with coaxial and planar HpGe-detectors.

5-min for short irradiation with a total proton flux
of 1.5*E15 for the detection of short-lived isotopes
and 27-min for long irradiation with a total proton
flux of 8.09*E15 for the measurement of intermediate
and long-lived isotopes.
